🔄 Roster Overrides (post-draft moves)
Log trades, cuts, and retirements that happen AFTER the draft so landing-spot signals (BLOCKED / VACATE) recompute for 2026 rookies.
Formats: Player Name out, Player Name → TEAM, Player Name retired. One per line.
Examples: "A.J. Brown → SF", "Tony Pollard out", "Aaron Rodgers retired"

🎂 Bulk Birthday Entry (2026 prospects)
Paste birthdays for 2026 prospects to fill missing age data. Age drives JM heavily for RB/WR/TE.
Format: Player Name: YYYY-MM-DD (one per line).
Examples: "Carson Beck: 2002-12-12", "Cade Klubnik: 2004-03-31"

SYNC?
Position Sync

When enabled, your positional rankings (RB1→RB2→RB3, WR1→WR2, etc.) and position-specific tiers automatically stay synced between paired modes:

• Redraft ↔ Superflex
• Dynasty 1QB ↔ Dynasty SF

Only the overall interleaving changes between formats (QBs rank higher in SF). Your within-position order and tiers stay identical across both.

Move any player or add/remove a tier in one mode and the paired mode updates instantly. Toggle ON to also do an initial sync from your current mode right now.

Guess the mystery player using the clues?
How to Play
Guess the mystery NFL player. Each guess reveals clues:

■ Green = Exact match
■ Yellow = Close
■ Red = Wrong

Team: Green if correct, red if wrong
Division: Green if exact, yellow if same conference, red if wrong
Position: Green if correct, red if wrong
Year (All-Time only): Year of best season. Green if exact, yellow if within 2 years, red otherwise
Szn High: Green if within 0.5 pts, yellow if within 30, red otherwise. Arrows show if answer is ↑ higher or ↓ lower
Wk High: Best single-week score (data back to 1999). Green if within 0.5 pts, yellow if within 5, red otherwise. Arrows show direction. Shows — if no weekly data available for that player

Current: Active players only · 6 attempts
2000s: Players whose best season was 2000-2009 · 8 attempts
2010s: Players whose best season was 2010-2019 · 8 attempts
All-Time: Legends · 8 attempts

Game Modes
Random: A random player is picked each round
Custom: Pick any player and create a challenge link to send to friends — they'll get the same player to guess

After finishing a game, tap Challenge a Friend to share a link with your results

How to Play
Guess the mystery NFL player in 6 tries. Each guess reveals clues:

■ Green = Exact match
■ Yellow = Close
■ Red = Wrong

Team: Green if correct, red if wrong
Division: Green if exact, yellow if same conference
Position: Green if correct, red if wrong
Szn High: Green if within 0.5 pts, yellow if within 30. Arrows show direction
Wk High: Best single-week score (data back to 1999). Green if within 0.5 pts, yellow if within 5. Arrows show direction. Shows — if no weekly data available for that player

Predictive scoring for every NFL draft prospect — powered by age, production, athleticism, film grades & more.
Prospect Model
JM Score (0-100) predicts NFL fantasy success from draft age, breakout age, production, conference, RAS, draft capital, size & teammate quality ?
PPG
Season Pts
Bulk Draft Capital Entry
Paste one prospect per line. Accepted formats:
1. Cam Ward  ·  Cam Ward 1  ·  Cam Ward, 1  ·  Cam Ward<tab>1
Add optional NFL team: Cam Ward 1 IND  ·  1. Cam Ward IND
Use U for undrafted. Only 2026 class prospects are updated.
Bulk RAS Entry
Paste a RAS.football CSV export (with Name/RAS columns) or one prospect per line.
Accepted line formats: Carson Beck, 7.82  ·  Carson Beck 7.82  ·  Carson Beck<tab>7.82
Only 2026 class prospects are updated. Values outside 0–10 are flagged.
Model Backtest
How the JM Score has performed against actual NFL outcomes for the 2020-2024 rookie classes. Higher tiers should produce more studs and fewer busts.
Class Position Metric how this is computed
Outcome window: Best season in years 1-3 (1-4 for QB) of NFL career. Minimum 8 GP per season to qualify.
Elite: any qualifying season with PPG ≥ 15 (RB/WR), 11 (TE), 20 (QB) — a true top-6 rookie-window outcome. Validation lens only; does not feed the JM weights.
Stud: top-12 PPG at position (top-6 for QB/TE) in any qualifying season.
Hit: top-24 PPG (top-12 for QB/TE) in any qualifying season.
Contributor: avg PPG ≥ 8 (RB/WR), 12 (QB), 5 (TE) across qualifying seasons.
Bust: below those thresholds across the full window.
Pending: window not complete and no Hit/Stud yet (mostly 2024 class).
Eligible universe: all skill-position rookies from HISTORICAL_DRAFT_PICKS 2020-2024 (~80/yr).
Calibration: Hit Rate by JM Tier
Tier N Elite Stud Hit+ Bust Avg PPG Calibration

HOW TO USE
📋
MY RANKINGS
Your personal custom rankings. Drag and drop players to reorder them, add and remove tiers to organize by position group, export your rankings to a spreadsheet, use the trade calculator powered by your custom values, and mock draft using your personal board.

Position Sync: Toggle the SYNC switch next to the mode tabs to keep your positional rankings (RB1, RB2, WR1, etc.) and position-specific tiers identical between paired formats — Redraft ↔ Superflex and Dynasty 1QB ↔ Dynasty SF. Only the overall interleaving changes (QBs rank higher in SF). Move a player or add a tier in either mode and the other updates automatically.
⭐
JACK'S RANKINGS
Jack's official rankings for the 2026 fantasy football season. View his player valuations, tier breakdowns, and use them as a reference when building your own board. Free users can see the top 24 overall (or top 12 per position).
🏷️
TIERS
Hover between any two players and click "+ Add Tier" to create a tier break. Tiers are separate for each position filter — your WR tiers won't affect your ALL tiers. Click the tier name to rename it, or the ✕ to remove it.
🔄
TRADE CALCULATOR
Evaluate trades using your custom rankings or Jack's rankings as the value source. Add players and draft picks to each side to see which team wins the deal.
🎯
MOCK DRAFT
Practice drafting against AI opponents using your personal rankings as the ADP board. Pick your draft slot, number of teams, and rounds to simulate a real draft experience. Use Rookie mode to practice dynasty rookie drafts with only the 2025 class, sorted by KTC dynasty values.
📊
EXPORT
Download your current rankings view as a CSV file that opens in Excel. It exports whatever you're viewing — filter to a specific position to export just those players.
💾
SAVING
Sign in to save your rankings to the cloud. After making changes, hit the Save button in the toolbar. Your rankings sync across devices and persist between sessions.
